clEntries.5.11.32: Updated Universal Tuya Zigbee app to v5.11.32 with 143 drivers and 3057 fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.31: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.31: Updated drivers and improved documentation.
clEntries.5.11.30: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.30: Re-enabled read-only forum intel, fixed driver misplacement, and updated 143 drivers with 3062 fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.29: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.29: Cleanup of scripts and workflows.
clEntries.5.11.28: Updated to v5.11.28 with 143 drivers and 3062 fingerprints. Includes script fixes for forum post editing.
clEntries.5.11.27: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.27: Added new AI providers and improved forum management.
clEntries.5.11.26: Fixed forum duplication issues and improved AI ensemble routing for better task classification.
clEntries.5.11.25: v5.11.25: Fixed voltage divisor in driver #137 — readings were off by a factor of 10 on some plug variants., Dashboard fallback rewrite — device tiles now update properly when the primary state channel drops., 17 new fingerprints from community contributions (138 drivers, 5182+ total FPs)., Internal cleanup across several workflow scripts.
clEntries.5.11.24: v5.11.24: Fixed a workflow trigger race condition. Forum scanner now covers 12 topics. Better diagnostics tracking between runs.
clEntries.5.11.23: v5.11.23: Switched post-forum-update to fetchWithRetry (fixes random post failures). RawClusterFallback for non-Tuya-DP devices. Forum deduplication so the same post doesn't get answered twice.
